summary: Tested ADP integration endpoints and ALE Calculator UI. All backend tests passed (7/7). Frontend shows correct empty state with two cards (Connect ADP + Demo Data) and Demo badge when mock data is loaded. All other pages render correctly with no regressions.

passed_tests: GET /api/adp/status/{employer_id} returns configured:false when no ADP credentials set
GET /api/adp/auth-url/{employer_id} returns 400 error when ADP not configured
POST /api/payroll/generate/{employer_id} generates mock data and summary shows source:mock
ALE Calculator page shows two cards (Connect ADP + Demo Data) when no payroll data exists
ALE Calculator page shows Demo badge and Reset/Regenerate buttons when mock data loaded
Generate Mock Payroll button works from the empty state

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load correctly, ADP integration UI working)

seed_data_creation: Mock payroll data generated via POST /api/payroll/generate/{employer_id}

mocked_apis.note: ADP API integration is built but not mocked - requires real ADP_CLIENT_ID and ADP_CLIENT_SECRET credentials to connect

context_for_next_testing_agent: ADP integration testing complete. Backend endpoints for ADP status, auth-url, disconnect, and sync are implemented. ADP credentials are NOT set in environment (ADP_CLIENT_ID and ADP_CLIENT_SECRET are empty), so ADP status returns configured:false and auth-url returns 400 error - this is expected behavior. Payroll summary now includes 'source' field (none/mock/adp). ALE Calculator UI shows two-card layout when no payroll data exists, and Demo badge with Reset/Regenerate buttons when mock data is loaded.
